error.default_config_enabled: default_config is still enabled in configuration.yaml. Remove it to manage default_config here.
error.advanced_warning: Advanced mode allows disabling default_config integrations. Use with caution.

data_description.mode: NOTE: Default Config Manager is ready to manage your default_config. Remove default_config from your configuration file and restart Home Assistant to enable management.

default_config_change.title: Default Config integration changed
default_config_change.description: The integration '{component}' was {action} by Default Config Manager.

restart_required.title: Restart Required
restart_required.description: Changes to your Default Config integrations have been detected. A restart is required for these changes to take effect.

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to restart Home Assistant to apply your changes?
